title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
notes: Nested control modifiers were combined in the wrong order, changing the circuit unitary.

title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
notes: Controlled rotations could be misclassified as commuting, enabling an incorrect transformation.

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
notes: Invalid loopback CouplingMap edges needed early rejection to prevent a transpilation failure.

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
notes: Substitution lost the circuit global phase; an oracle modulo global phase cannot detect it.

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
notes: Nested control-flow blocks could skip BasisTranslator rewrites, leaving target translation incomplete.

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
notes: BreakLoopOp traversal raised an AttributeError because the operation has no blocks attribute.

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
notes: Reusing ConsolidateBlocks across differently sized circuits leaked qubit-map state and could panic.

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
notes: VF2PostLayout could fail during layout finalization for an active uncoupled or one-qubit wire.

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
notes: initial_index_layout used dictionary enumeration order rather than the required virtual-qubit order.

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
notes: The returned Layout omitted idle virtual qubits; this is a layout-contract defect.

title: Fix composition of final_layout
notes: final_layout permutation composition was reversed; this is a layout-contract property.

title: Fix non-determinism in CommutativeCancellation
notes: Hash-iteration order made the transformed result non-deterministic across fixed-seed runs.

title: Fix non-determinism VF2Layout with only 1q gates
notes: Tie-breaking over a hash set made VF2Layout output vary across fixed-seed runs.

title: Restore correct max_trials behaviour for VF2Layout pass
notes: max_trials limits could be treated as unbounded, causing avoidable compile-time work; negative-input handling is a secondary failure case.

title: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
notes: Deepcopy/pickling corrupted internal variable-IO node roles; this is an edge-of-transpiler invariant rather than a demonstrated output-map change.

title: Fix composing virtual permutation layouts for ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
notes: Virtual permutation layout composition used the wrong inverse or order while the circuit map is interpreted via layout metadata.

title: Propagate DAGCircuit.name in ApplyLayout
notes: ApplyLayout dropped the circuit name, a metadata-propagation contract.

title: Add 2q fractional gates to the ConsolidateBlocks transpiler pass
notes: Missing fractional two-qubit consolidation left equivalent circuits with avoidable extra gates; the linked item is enhancement-like.

title: Use average gate fidelity in the commutation checker
notes: The commutation criterion could produce a non-equivalent transpiled circuit for small-angle rotations.

title: Fix tracking of routing permutation in Sabre with disjoint backends
notes: Routing-permutation metadata was incomplete with disjoint backends; final-layout inspection could fail.

title: Delegate BasePass.__call__ to PassManager.run
notes: Calling a pass directly could fail because required pass-manager execution behavior was skipped.

title: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
notes: Routing stripped control-flow wire dependencies, an invalid semantic transformation.

title: Fix 4-pi periodicity of controlled rotations in the CommutationChecker
notes: Controlled Pauli rotations were treated as identity with the wrong 2π rather than 4π periodicity.

title: Fix ElidePermutations pass in the presence of PermutationGates
notes: PermutationGate handling updated the mapping incorrectly, producing incorrect output circuits.

title: VF2PostLayout added at L3 (no-op overhead; reverted)
notes: A no-op VF2PostLayout stage added compile-time overhead and was later reverted.

title: Fix panic on 1.0 error in VF2Layout
notes: VF2Layout could panic when a 1.0 error rate produced NaN scoring.

title: Fix cache and prediction misses in Target::qargs
notes: VF2 compile-time slowdown from cache and branch-prediction misses; output and quality unchanged.

title: Accept rotation gate names in CommutationChecker filters
notes: A conservative commutation filter incorrectly rejected RX pairs, preventing valid optimization while preserving semantics.

title: Fix incorrect global phase shift for P and U1 gates in CommutativeCancellation
notes: Incorrect P/U1 phase accumulation; invisible to an oracle that compares modulo global phase.

title: Fix schedule analysis passes with empty circuits
notes: Empty circuits were rejected by schedule analysis even though they are trivially schedulable.

title: Avoid panics in Optimize1qGatesDecomposition
notes: A legitimate input path caused a Rust panic in Optimize1qGatesDecomposition.

title: Fix pickling of SabreSwap
notes: Pickling a populated SabreSwap instance failed; serialization plumbing at the edge of transpiler scope.

title: Un-provide standard_operation for PyGate
notes: Misidentifying controlled PyGates lost a non-default control state and could enable incorrect downstream transformations.

title: Check target gates are parameterized in optimize1qgatesdecomposition
notes: Target capability was inferred from a gate name alone; target-ineligible decomposition could be selected while the unitary remains unchanged.

title: Raise exception not panic on bad ConsolidateBlocks input
notes: Bad but legitimate ConsolidateBlocks input caused a Rust panic instead of a normal error.

title: Read timing constraints from target when no backend is provided
notes: Target timing constraints were ignored when no backend was supplied; scheduling configuration contract rather than the output map.

title: Fix global cache of SynthesizeRZRotations
notes: A precision-dependent stale synthesis cache can produce an incorrect RZ approximation across runs.

title: Fix non-deterministic ConsolidateBlocks output with fixed transpiler seed
notes: Fixed-seed runs could choose different basis gates because of iteration order; each result remains semantically valid.

title: Preserve global phase in Commuting2qGateRouter
notes: Commuting2qGateRouter failed to preserve global phase only.

title: Fix excessive global-phase accumulation in UnrollForLoops
notes: Loop unrolling accumulated the body global phase one extra time.

title: Fix unsafe symmetric simplification of XXPlusYY in CommutativeOptimization
notes: Unsafe cancellation of a direction-sensitive XXPlusYY pair changed circuit behavior.

title: Fix cancellation of CS and CSdg in InverseCancellation
notes: Reversible symmetric pairs were left uncancelled, producing a semantically correct but worse circuit.

title: Fix forced ConsolidateBlocks decomposition for incomplete bases
notes: Forced block consolidation silently did not occur with incomplete basis information, leaving a less optimized circuit.

title: Fix ParameterVector global-phase panic in RemoveIdentityEquivalent
notes: A ParameterVector global-phase path caused an interpreter-detachment panic.

title: Fix commutation checking between two Pauli product measurements
notes: Measurements overwriting the same classical bit were treated as commutable, which can change measured output.

title: Fix synth_qft_line failure for circuits with 32 or more qubits
notes: An integer overflow could silently construct an incorrect large-QFT circuit (and panic in debug builds).

title: Fix stale best-DAG update in C transpiler optimization level 3
notes: Level-3 optimization retained a stale worse DAG despite tracking a better candidate.

title: Fix matrix-size validation in CommutationChecker
notes: A broken matrix-size guard allowed oversized commutation matrices, increasing compile-time memory and cost.

title: Fix synth_clifford_depth_lnn for single-qubit Clifford circuits
notes: Single-qubit Clifford synthesis raised a capacity-overflow panic.

title: Fix HLS qubit tracking for plugin-generated operations
notes: Incorrect restoration of ancilla identities can make later high-level synthesis use the wrong qubits.

title: Fix zero-length permutation synthesis overflow
notes: Zero-qubit permutation synthesis hung or overflowed instead of terminating normally.

title: Fix incorrect argument passed to generate_unroll_3q in Clifford+T transpilation
notes: An incorrect optimization metric selected higher-T decompositions while preserving semantics.

title: Respect Target when selecting a non-default UnitarySynthesis plugin
notes: Standalone basis gates overrode the supplied Target during plugin selection; a target-constraint contract issue, not stated logical-output corruption.

title: Fix control-flow qargs handling in BasisTranslator
notes: Control-flow translation used local instead of absolute qubit indices, so operations could be translated on wrong qubits.

title: Fix ConsolidateBlocks qubit mapping inside control-flow blocks
notes: Mismapped hardware qubits made in-basis control-flow operations appear out of basis, causing unnecessary consolidation.

title: Fix DAG push-edge ordering non-determinism
notes: DAG edge insertion order varied across equivalent runs.

title: Preserve registers through Python Layout to Rust TranspileLayout conversion
notes: TranspileLayout lost register tracking during Python/Rust conversion while the applied circuit output remained intact.

title: Fix global-phase handling in CommutativeCancellation
notes: Commutative cancellation omitted induced global-phase shifts.

title: Do not run VF2PostLayout when an explicit layout is supplied
notes: The preset pass manager ignored an explicit requested layout, violating the layout-selection contract while remaining layout-equivalent.

title: Fix Target.py_instruction_supported behavior
notes: Target capability query returned true for a mismatched qarg order; a capability-contract defect.

title: Fix MCX dirty-ancilla qubit accounting in HLS selection
notes: A usable lower-cost MCX decomposition was not selected with mixed clean and dirty ancillas.

title: Fix CommutativeInverseCancellation for Clifford, control-flow, and non-invertible operations
notes: CommutativeInverseCancellation crashed on control-flow, Clifford, or non-invertible instructions.

title: Fix ApplyLayout with empty layout
notes: ApplyLayout falsely rejected a valid zero-qubit circuit.

title: Fix HLS classical-bit mapping from control-flow blocks
notes: Incorrect global classical-bit mapping can change control-flow and measured classical outputs.

title: Fix alignment checks of stretch variables
notes: Alignment verification rejected stretch-variable circuits that require lower-level scheduling resolution.

title: Fix subtraction-underflow panic in ConstrainedReschedule
notes: A negative-overlap path panicked from unsigned subtraction underflow.

title: Initialize ConstrainedReschedule.target unconditionally
notes: Alignment-only ConstrainedReschedule construction raised AttributeError because target was uninitialized.

title: Fix ConstrainedReschedule barrier handling
notes: ConstrainedReschedule incorrectly rejected barrier directives.

title: Add safe shape checking to synth_cz_depth_line_mr
notes: An invalid matrix shape could trigger a Rust panic; the fix validates input safely.

title: Fix HighLevelSynthesis for custom gate calibrations
notes: High-level synthesis did not recognize nested custom calibrations; calibration preservation is not visible in a logical output-map oracle.
